title: NH-9 Hisar Bypass Road Widening
description: 4-lane widening of National Highway 9 from Hisar bypass to Hansi road junction. Includes drainage, streetlights and dividers.

reports.title: Month 3 Progress
reports.description: Base layer completed for 4.2 km stretch. Drainage work 80% done.

reports.title: Month 6 Progress
reports.description: Asphalt paving completed for 7 km. Dividers installation started.

title: Adampur Block Water Pipeline Upgrade
description: Replacement of 35-year-old water supply pipeline covering 18 villages in Adampur block. New 200mm HDPE pipes with 24x7 supply.

reports.title: Trench Excavation Complete
reports.description: Trench work done for 12 km main pipeline. Pipe laying started.

title: Hisar Smart City Solar Street Lights
description: Installation of 2,400 solar LED street lights across Hisar urban wards 1-20. Includes smart sensor-based dimming system.

reports.title: Final Completion Report
reports.description: All 2,400 solar lights installed and operational. Citizen feedback positive.

title: Barwala-Hisar Rural Road Construction
description: Construction of 22 km concrete road connecting Barwala block villages to Hisar city. Covers 8 villages: Sandila, Dhansu, Ghangala, Balsamand and 4 others.

reports.title: Foundation Work Update
reports.description: Sub-grade preparation complete for 6 km. Concrete mixing plant setup at Barwala.

title: Hansi Primary School Building Renovation
description: Renovation of 12 primary schools in Hansi block. New classrooms, toilets, drinking water facility and boundary walls.

reports.title: Project Completion
reports.description: All 12 schools renovated. New toilets and drinking water operational. 3,200 students benefited.

title: Uklana Drainage & Flood Control
description: Construction of main drainage channel (4.8 km) in Uklana Mandi to prevent seasonal flooding. Includes 3 retention ponds.

reports.title: Drainage Channel Progress
reports.description: 2.6 km channel dug and lined. Retention pond 1 complete. Monsoon test successful.

title: Narnaund Community Health Centre
description: New 30-bed Community Health Centre at Narnaund with OPD, operation theatre, maternity ward and pathology lab.

reports.title: Structure Complete
reports.description: Main building structure done. Electrical and plumbing work ongoing. Equipment procurement started.

title: Agroha Heritage Site Development
description: Development of tourist infrastructure at Agroha Dham — parking, cafeteria, visitor centre, signage and 2 km approach road.

title: Hisar District Solid Waste Management Plant
description: Modern solid waste processing plant with 150 TPD capacity. Includes segregation unit, composting yard and landfill management.

reports.title: Delay Notice
reports.description: Land acquisition dispute delayed construction. Court matter resolved. Restarting Jan 2025.

title: Bass-Litani Rural Electrification
description: Complete electrification of 14 hamlets in Bass and Litani blocks. 11 kV feeder line, transformers and last-mile connections for 2,100 households.

reports.title: Completion Certificate
reports.description: All 2,100 households electrified. 14 hamlets now have 18-hour daily power supply.
